name: Peppera
description: A meal-planning assistant that turns rough ingredients into practical dinner ideas.

mascot.name: Peppera Mascot
mascot.description: A cheerful green pepper character with a red bandana, friendly cartoon face, and simple expressive limbs.
mascot.role: The recurring face of Peppera's TikTok and Instagram content.
mascot.visualPrompt: Use the cheerful green pepper mascot as the main character in the frame, keeping the design consistent.
usageRules: Use the mascot as the recognisable face of Peppera social content.
Prefer mascot-led variants for TikTok and Instagram visual storytelling.
Keep the mascot consistent across poses, face shape, bandana, and overall style.
